name: Carrot Cake Crest
description: Notes Part of the Fresh Carrot Paladin Set. Although the description doesn’t state it, the effect most likely curses just like Abyssal Insignia.
effects: Summon a sweet carrot cake for 5 seconds Carrot Cake Effect: Sugar bombs enemies and deals 150-200 damage within 4.5 sqrs every 0.4 seconds Ignores defense of target
